productDisplayName: New Hide Men Antique Brown Wallet
description: Crafted from superior quality leather and designed with practicality, this wallet from Newhide makes for a perfect everyday wallet. Open width: 19 cm Height: 12 cm Made of pure leather with brand name embossed on the outer Two compartments to hold currency notes Left flap has card holders, a zippered pouch to hold coins and a compartment Right flap has one compartment and card holders Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
